title: Gluten Intolerance
description: This mod makes you Gluten intolerant and damages you when eating Bread,Cookies,Pumpkin pie and Cake.
body: This mod adds Gluten Intolerance which causes foods Like Bread, Pumpkin pie, Cookies and Cake to give you hunger and the Gluten Intolerance Status effect. This mod was made as a funny thing between friends and most likely wont be much active. Its also my first mod project so it most likely has alot of bugs. Its not been tested in Multiplayer.
